mapper.select: SELECT m.*, s.nickname AS sender_nickname, r.nickname AS receiver_nickname FROM user_message m JOIN sys_user s ON m.sender_id = s.user_id JOIN sys_user r ON m.receiver_id = r.user_id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{peerId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{peerId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m.create_time ASC

SELECT m.*, s.nickname AS sender_nickname, r.nickname AS receiver_nickname FROM user_message m JOIN sys_user s ON m.sender_id = s.user_id JOIN sys_user r ON m.receiver_id = r.user_id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{userId} OR m.sender_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_message(sender_id, receiver_id, goods_id, content, is_read) VALUES(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{goodsId}, #{content}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND sender_id = #{peerId} AND is_read = 0
UPDATE user_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0

SELECT m.*, s.nickname AS sender_nickname, s.avatar AS sender_avatar, r.nickname AS receiver_nickname, g.title AS goods_title, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_message um WHERE um.receiver_id = #{userId} AND um.is_read = 0 AND um.sender_id = CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END) AS unreadCount FROM user_message m LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON m.sender_id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user r ON m.receiver_id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN goods g ON m.goods_id = g.goods_id WHERE m.message_id IN ( SELECT MAX(message_id) FROM user_message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY LEAST(sender_id, receiver_id), GREATEST(sender_id, receiver_id) ) ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{peerId}) OR (sender_id = #{peerId} AND receiver_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, s.nickname AS sender_nickname, r.nickname AS receiver_nickname FROM user_message m LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON m.sender_id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user r ON m.receiver_id = r.user_id WHERE m.message_id = #{messageId}
